query:
SELECT DISTINCT openingName, opening, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM puzzles
WHERE openingName LIKE '%Sicilian%' OR openingName LIKE '%Queen%Gambit%' OR opening LIKE '%Sicilian%' OR opening LIKE '%Queen%Gambit%'
GROUP BY openingName, opening
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 30;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute
